sentences.english: I have two dogs and they're like my children.
sentences.korean: 개 두 마리가 있는데 내 아이들 같아요.

sentences.english: I take them everywhere — the park, the beach, even shopping.
sentences.korean: 어디든 데려가요 — 공원 해변 심지어 쇼핑까지.

sentences.english: I have a cat and she's very independent.
She comes to me when she wants attention and ignores me the rest of the time.
sentences.korean: 관심이 필요할 때만 오고 나머지 시간에는 무시해요.

sentences.english: I want a pet but my apartment doesn't allow them.
So I just watch pet videos online instead.
sentences.korean: 그래서 대신 온라인으로 반려동물 영상을 봐요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
